case_title: NCC GROUP SECURITY SERVICES, INC. VS. ROTHENBERG VENTURES LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2018 CONTINUED TO NOV-07-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100047660) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF RUDY GABA, JR. IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100047660) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCC GROUP SECURITY SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT, PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100047660) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCC GROUP SECURITY SERVICES, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $530.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100047660) AS TO DEFENDANT ROTHENBERG VENTURES LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100047886) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCC GROUP SECURITY SERVICES, INC. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NCC GROUP SECURITY SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROTHENBERG VENTURES LLC $96,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $9,254.00 INTEREST, $530.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $106,284.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
